title: TimberTouch™ Resin Cross Back Chair - Dark Brown with Texture - Closeout
features: Our new commercial-grade Resin Cross Back Chair combines rustic and graceful elegance with modern and durable construction meant to meet the expectations of busy event seasons.

Suitable for indoor or outdoor use, Resin Cross Backs are a great seating option for your guests or customers - whether it be a wedding, banquet hall, restauraunt, cafe or even your own home.These new age farm chairs are here to take you into the next decade and beyond
